textPlain: For some reason the VibeVoice model from Microsoft (which is also able to clone voices and is also very good) has been deleted from GitHub 10 days ago even tough it was released under a MIT license. But this post shows that the cat is out of the bag for some time already now (post is from 2021) and we have to live with this technology.
Atomic bomb level technological shifts happening, open sourced online. What a time to be alive!
The reason is known: "we discovered instances where the tool was used in ways inconsistent with the stated intent"
